home.heroSubtitle: Building the future through precision craftsmanship, quality materials, and a genuine dedication to construction excellence — across Switzerland.
home.tailoredExpertiseDesc: Precision, reliability, and quality craftsmanship — tailored to the specific needs of private clients across Switzerland.
home.philosophyDesc1: We treat every project with the same seriousness, regardless of scale. Specialist teams, premium materials, and a hands-on approach — from initial consultation to final handover.
home.philosophyDesc2: From tiling and flooring to plastering and full construction — we are your trusted partner for every stage of building in Switzerland.
home.contactTeam: Contact our team to discuss your project. We bring precision craftsmanship to every build across Switzerland — large or small.

services.privateClientsDesc: Precision interior finishes for private clients and complete renovation projects. We deliver impeccable quality.
services.aptFinishingDesc: Exterior finishes and thermal facades with polystyrene or mineral wool. Services provided for both private and industrial sectors.
services.flooringDesc: Solid structural construction, masonry, and carpentry. We build a lasting foundation for your project.

expertise.title: How We Work
expertise.desc: Precision, reliability, and architectural excellence — tailored to the specific demands of private residences and residential developments across Switzerland.
expertise.contactDiscuss: Contact our team to discuss your vision. We bring Swiss precision to every project, across all cantons.

services.resLead: Precision interior finishes for any type of space.
services.resBody: We offer complete and meticulous interior finishing services, ideal for private clients and complex renovations.
services.intBody: We execute exterior finishes and thermal insulation systems for both private residences and industrial facilities.
services.floorLead: The solid foundation of your construction project.
services.floorBody: Our structural works teams deliver the core framework of your building, ensuring durability and safety.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: We begin with an in-depth meeting to understand your vision, requirements, budget, and timeline.

steps.title: Design & Planning
steps.desc: Our team develops comprehensive project plans, ensuring full transparency on scope, materials, and cost.

steps.title: Permits & Approvals
steps.desc: We handle all regulatory submissions and permits, navigating Swiss building law with expertise.

steps.title: Construction
steps.desc: Precision execution by our specialist teams, with rigorous quality control at every stage.

steps.title: Handover
steps.desc: Final inspection, full documentation, and handover — with a written satisfaction guarantee.

portfolio.title: Our Work
portfolio.desc: A selection of completed projects — residential construction, apartment finishing, and flooring executed with professionalism and quality materials.

company.title: About ArcoBau
company.desc: A Swiss construction company dedicated to quality residential building, interior finishing, and flooring — serving private clients across Switzerland with precision, reliability, and care.

cards.heritageDesc: Rooted in Swiss craftsmanship, ArcoBau brings precision engineering and meticulous attention to detail to every project across Switzerland. Our expertise spans residential construction, interior finishing, and flooring — delivered with the reliability Swiss clients expect.
cards.missionDesc: Construim Viitorul — We Build the Future. Our mission is to deliver high-quality construction and finishing services to private clients throughout Switzerland, combining the work ethic of skilled craftsmen with Swiss standards of quality and punctuality.
cards.valuesDesc: Quality, reliability, and transparency form the core of our philosophy. We provide clear quotes, explain every stage of the work, and don't leave until everything is perfect. Written guarantee on all completed works.

values.teamsDesc: We do not subcontract. We have our own teams for each trade: masonry, tiling, flooring, drylining, and installations.
values.guaranteeDesc: We provide a written guarantee on all work carried out. If any issue arises, we return and resolve it at no additional cost.
values.punctualityDesc: We set realistic timelines from the start and honour them. We communicate proactively about every stage of the project.
values.materialsDesc: We use materials from verified Swiss and European suppliers. We present the options and prices transparently — no hidden costs.

timeline.event: The beginnings – first finishing projects and gaining international experience
Expanding our teams and taking on our first full construction projects
Developing partnerships with premium material suppliers across Europe
Over 100 projects successfully completed for a diverse range of clients
Vast market experience, with hundreds of delivered projects and teams of international professionals

company.commitmentDesc: Every project we undertake is a testament to our commitment to quality. From the first consultation to the final handover, ArcoBau stands behind every decision with full transparency and professional integrity — the Swiss way.

contact.title: Start Your Project
contact.desc: We would love to hear about your vision. Fill out the form below and one of our specialists will be in touch within one business day.

form.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We will contact you within one business day.
form.title: Project Inquiry
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project vision, location, timeline, and any specific requirements...
form.privacyMsg: By submitting, you agree to our Privacy Policy. We will respond within one business day.
